post.content:
Screening Round: 10 questions in total, 2 problem solving and rest MCQ types.

Round 1: Graph problem based on minimum spanning tree.

Round 2: Two tree based question, One was LC easy and other was based on BST division LC hard.

Round 3: Design a service which can upload photos, can geo tag them and stuff. Something like flickr. (HLD)

Round 4: All BQ. 

Round 5: Project discussion and BQ
What is BST division question on Leetcode?

Strange to see no machine coding round? I think Uber also has a machine coding round these days. Also, I assume interviews were conducted remotely. How was the screening round conducted? Are MCQ\'s important?
Can you share the Round-1 exact question
Hey did you write any test cases or used some OOP in round 1,2 or they were simple coding rounds ?
@OP, after your system design round, were the remaining rounds scheduled immediately or u had to wait for few days?
is this ML interview? what to expect in ML interview?
hey, can you also tell after how many days of giving the screening round, did you get a call for interview?
Can you tell what is BQ and  how much experience do you have?
